languages.text: "Так точно, Ваша Светлость. Вырезаю для себя и для ребят всякое, иногда — по заказу. Добровольцам игрушки, медали для награждения, на прикладах что-то. Иногда помогаю с протезами. Но мне и самому в удовольствие".

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."
languages.original_text: "Так точно, Ваша Светлость. Вырезаю для себя и для ребят всякое, иногда — по заказу. Добровольцам игрушки, медали для награждения, на прикладах что-то. Иногда помогаю с протезами. Но мне и самому в удовольствие".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the lads, sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I do it for the pleasure of the thing."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the lads, sometimes I take commissions. Toys for kids, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I do it for the pleasure of the thing."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the lads, sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I do it for the pleasure of the thing."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

"Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

languages.text: 「ええ、御{mf|殿|殿}|様。自分と仲間のために、時には依頼を受けて彫刻をしています。子供たちの玩具、賞状のメダル、銃のストックに付ける装飾品。時には義手義足も作りますが、それはただ彫刻をするのが楽しいからですね」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the lads, sometimes I take commissions. Toys for kids, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I do it for the pleasure of the thing."

languages.text: "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kendime ve millete bir şeyler oyuyorum, bazen sipariş alıyorum. Gönüllülere oyuncaklar, ödüllük madalyalar, silah dipçiklerine takılacak parçalar. Ayrıca bazen protezlere yardım ediyorum. Tüm bunları keyif aldığım için yapıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

traits.locale_text: "Evet {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kendime ve millete bir şeyler oyuyorum, bazen sipariş alıyorum. Gönüllülere oyuncaklar, ödüllük madalyalar, silah dipçiklerine takılacak parçalar. Ayrıca bazen protezlere yardım ediyorum. Tüm bunları keyif aldığım için yapıyorum."

languages.text: “是的，大人。我给自己和弟兄们刻东西，有时也接活儿，譬如给志愿者做玩具、做授奖勋章、给枪托做配饰，偶尔还帮忙制作义体。但我做这些也是出于爱好。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

traits.locale_text: “是的，大人。我给自己和弟兄们刻东西，有时也接活儿，譬如给志愿者做玩具、做授奖勋章、给枪托做配饰，偶尔还帮忙制作义体。但我做这些也是出于爱好。”

languages.text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich schnitze für mich selbst und meine Kameraden. Manchmal nehme ich auch Aufträge an. Spielzeug für Freiwillige, Medaillen, Dekorationen für Waffenschäfte. Ab und an schnitze ich sogar Prothesen. Oder auch nur aus Spaß an der Freude."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich schnitze für mich selbst und meine Kameraden. Manchmal nehme ich auch Aufträge an. Spielzeug für Freiwillige, Medaillen, Dekorationen für Waffenschäfte. Ab und an schnitze ich sogar Prothesen. Oder auch nur aus Spaß an der Freude."

languages.text: « Oui, Votre Seigneurie. Je sculpte aussi bien pour moi-même que pour les autres. J'accepte même parfois des commandes : des jouets pour les volontaires, des médailles à distribuer, des pièces de crosse de fusil… Il m'arrive de fabriquer des prothèses, mais je le fais aussi pour le plaisir. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, Votre Seigneurie. Je sculpte aussi bien pour moi-même que pour les autres. J'accepte même parfois des commandes : des jouets pour les volontaires, des médailles à distribuer, des pièces de crosse de fusil… Il m'arrive de fabriquer des prothèses, mais je le fais aussi pour le plaisir. »

languages.text: «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Tallo cosas para mí y para los otros, a veces por encargo. Juguetes para los voluntarios, medallas para condecoraciones, decoraciones para culatas. A veces ayudo con las prótesis. Pero también lo hago por el placer de hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I carve things for myself and for the fellows, and sometimes I take commissions. Toys for volunteers, medals for awards, pieces to put on gun stocks. Sometimes I help with prosthetics. But I also do it for the pleasure of the thing."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Tallo cosas para mí y para los otros, a veces por encargo. Juguetes para los voluntarios, medallas para condecoraciones, decoraciones para culatas. A veces ayudo con las prótesis. Pero también lo hago por el placer de hacerlo».
